history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A “LEVEL UP!” game-style interface screen shows progress details for “VYNZ | BOT” with level and experience information.

Main Subject:
The central focus is a rectangular, dark UI panel containing the title “VYNZ | BOT” and multiple progress indicators and stats, including a level number, an experience bar, and several small stat boxes.

Setting:
The image is entirely a digital graphic with no real-world background; it appears like a dashboard or progress screen on a dark theme interface. The lighting is uniform and comes from the screen’s UI glow, with no natural lighting or weather.

Visual Details:
The overall background is dark purple/near-black with a subtle gradient. At the top center, large yellow text reads “LEVEL UP!” with small diamond-like decorative marks. Inside the main rounded rectangle panel, the “VYNZ | BOT” title appears in white, with a small yellow circular badge to the right containing “#2”. Below the title, “LEVEL PROGRESS” appears in smaller text. On the left is a circular avatar image with a purple outer ring and a collage-like anime-style scene inside the circle. In the middle are two rounded stat boxes: one smaller box on the left shows “LEVEL 9” with the number “9” in white, and a larger box on the right shows “EXPERIENCE 8 / 500” with “8 / 500” in larger white text. Beneath them is a long horizontal progress bar: a dark track with a very small filled segment near the left, and a “1%” label to the right. Below the bar are three smaller rounded boxes labeled “MESSAGES 513”, “XP NEEDED 492”, and “NEXT LVL 10”. The “Congratulations on leveling up!” line is visible near the bottom, in faint text. The camera angle is straight-on and the composition is centered with consistent UI spacing.

Visible Text:
LEVEL UP!
VYNZ | BOT
#2
LEVEL PROGRESS
LEVEL
9
EXPERIENCE
8 / 500
1%
MESSAGES
513
XP NEEDED
492
NEXT LVL
10
Congratulations on leveling up!

Practical Summary:
The image shows a dark-themed level-up progress dashboard for “VYNZ | BOT,” including current level, experience progress, messages, and remaining XP. It also displays a small experience progress bar indicating 1% progress toward the next level.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
